EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The transfer of traffic via the {protocol} protocol from {src.host}:{src.port} to {dst.host}:{dst.port} was rejected on host {event_src.host}
The transfer of traffic via the {protocol} protocol from {src.host}:{src.port} to {dst.host}:{dst.port} was droped on host {event_src.host}
The transfer of traffic via the {protocol} protocol from {src.host}:{src.port} to {dst.host}:{dst.port} was accepted on host {event_src.host}
The transfer of traffic via the {protocol} protocol from {src.host} to {dst.host} was droped on host {event_src.host}
The transfer of traffic via the {protocol} protocol from {src.host} to {dst.host} was accepted on host {event_src.host}
The transfer of traffic via the {protocol} protocol from {src.host} to {dst.host} was rejected on host {event_src.host}
